Asterix & Obelix: Mission Cleopatra

Astérix & Obélix : Mission Cléopâtre

"The funniest film in ancient history!"

7.4
2002MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

History's favorite Gauls assist Queen Cleopatra when she wagers that the Egyptian people can build a palace for Julius Caesar in just three months.

Tags

egyptmagicpalacecivil engineercleopatraancient romeancient worldbased on children's bookancient egyptgrandsympathetic
